name: News
description: Current news articles from the GNews API with language and country filtering.

fallback_stories.title: Community Volunteers Plant Trees in Local Park
fallback_stories.description: Residents came together to plant dozens of trees, making the neighborhood greener and more welcoming for families.

fallback_stories.title: New Library Program Brings Books to Seniors
fallback_stories.description: A new delivery service ensures that homebound seniors can enjoy fresh books and magazines every week.

fallback_stories.title: Scientists Discover New Species of Butterfly
fallback_stories.description: Researchers have identified a beautiful new butterfly species in a tropical forest, adding to our understanding of nature.

fallback_stories.title: Town Celebrates Annual Harvest Festival
fallback_stories.description: Families gathered for food, music, and fun at the yearly harvest celebration that brings the community together.

fallback_stories.title: Garden Club Shares Tips for Spring Planting
fallback_stories.description: Local gardening experts share their best advice for growing flowers and vegetables this spring season.
